{{Infobox madra
| name = royal madra
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Royal madra]] can be used to conjure the [[Nine-Light Mirror]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4">''Wintersteel'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Sha Relliar]] uses [[royal madra]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22">''Dreadgod'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Sha Miara]] uses [[royal madra]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30">''Waybound'', chapter 30</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
